Title: Rocco and His Brothers
Writer: Luchino Visconti, Suso Cecchi D'Amico, Vasco Pratolini
Actors: Alain Delon, Renato Salvatori, Annie Girardot
Plot: Having recently been uprooted to Milan, Rocco and his four brothers each look for a new way in life when a prostitute comes between Rocco and his brother Simone.
Awards: Nominated for 2 BAFTA 10 wins & 10 nominations total

Title: Close
Actors: Eden Dambrine, Gustav De Waele, Émilie Dequenne
Plot: The intense friendship between two thirteen-year old boys Leo and Remi suddenly gets disrupted. Struggling to understand what has happened, Léo approaches Sophie, Rémi's mother. "Close" is a film about friendship and responsibility.
Awards: Nominated for 1 Oscar. 30 wins & 45 nominations total

Title: The Sea Beast
Writer: Chris Williams, Nell Benjamin, Mattson Tomlin
Actors: Karl Urban, Zaris-Angel Hator, Jared Harris
Plot: When a young girl stows away on the ship of a legendary sea monster hunter, they launch an epic journey into uncharted waters - and make history to boot.

Title: Teen Wolf: The Movie
Writer: Jeff Davis, Will Wallace, Joseph P. Genier
Actors: Tyler Posey, Crystal Reed, Holland Roden
Plot: A terrifying evil has emerged. The wolves howl once again, but only a Werewolf like Scott McCall, can gather both new allies and reunite trusted friends to fight back against what could be the most powerful and deadliest enemy.
